items.title: Team Lead | Full-stack Developer
items.description: I led three projects focused on data analytics and retail platforms, working on software architecture, API development, CI/CD, databases and user interfaces. My main focus was coordinating teams and processes to build scalable, functional solutions aligned with business needs, ensuring both technical quality and product value.

items.title: Front-end Developer
items.description: My main work was migrating and maintaining custom web applications, building modern, functional interfaces centered on user experience.

items.title: CI/CD Intern
items.description: I completed professional internships in the Continuous Integration and Deployment (CI/CD) area, contributing to maintenance, continuous improvement and monitoring of web applications and systems developed with Angular.

items.title: Web Development Intern
items.description: I contributed to the development of an internal web application built with Next.js, using Microsoft Azure as the cloud services platform for deployment and administration. I gained hands-on experience building modern web applications, as well as implementing and managing cloud solutions, focusing on efficient and functional user interfaces.

items.title: Full-stack Developer
items.description: I developed web applications and tailor-made software solutions for Dapper Technologies clients, using technologies like Angular, Flutter and Express.js to create functional, scalable products tailored to each project's needs.

items.title: CI/CD Intern
items.description: I completed professional internships contributing to the maintenance, continuous improvement and monitoring of web applications and systems developed with Angular.
